query: Find 10 buildings in Kristiansand municipality within 50 metres of 200-year storm-surge areas, sorted by shortest distance first, and report both municipality and county.

1.description: get Kristiansand kommunenummer, kommunenavn and bounding box/geometry

2.description: get 200-year storm-surge polygons reduced to Kristiansand bbox

3.description: get buildings in Kristiansand municipality (filtered by kommunenummer)

4.description: get county polygons intersecting Kristiansand bbox

5.description: find nearest 200-year storm polygon to each building (returns distance_m)

6.description: keep only building-storm pairs with distance_m <= 50 m

7.description: attach county attributes to the filtered buildings by spatial intersection

8.description: select building id, distance, municipality and county names

executions.sql: SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade, ST_XMin(ST_Extent(omrade)) AS xmin, ST_XMax(ST_Extent(omrade)) AS xmax, ST_YMin(ST_Extent(omrade)) AS ymin, ST_YMax(ST_Extent(omrade)) AS ymax FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE 'Kristiansand%' GROUP BY kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade;

SELECT objid, objtype, lokalid, oppdateringsdato, malemetode, opphav, omrade, sikkerhetsklasseflom, vannstandovernn2000 FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna WHERE ST_Intersects(omrade, ST_SetSRID(ST_MakeEnvelope(62543.56990607368,6428946.019998128,107683.72996255726,6493405.01999838),25833));

SELECT objid, kommunennummer, kommunenavn, bygningsnummer, bygningid, representasjonspunkt, ST_Distance(representasjonspunkt, storm.omrade) AS distance_m
FROM matrikkelenbygning_fe504ac373564e10b85865ef2a507c63.bygning AS b
CROSS JOIN LATERAL (
  SELECT omrade FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna AS s
  WHERE ST_DWithin(b.representasjonspunkt, s.omrade, 5000) -- limit candidate polygons to within 5km for performance
  ORDER BY b.representasjonspunkt <-> s.omrade
  LIMIT 1
) AS storm
WHERE b.kommunenummer = '4204';

final.sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade, ST_XMin(ST_Extent(omrade)) AS xmin, ST_XMax(ST_Extent(omrade)) AS xmax, ST_YMin(ST_Extent(omrade)) AS ymin, ST_YMax(ST_Extent(omrade)) AS ymax FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE 'Kristiansand%' GROUP BY kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [stormflohavniva]
SELECT objid, objtype, lokalid, oppdateringsdato, malemetode, opphav, omrade, sikkerhetsklasseflom, vannstandovernn2000 FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna WHERE ST_Intersects(omrade, ST_SetSRID(ST_MakeEnvelope(62543.56990607368,6428946.019998128,107683.72996255726,6493405.01999838),25833));

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [matrikkelenbygning]
SELECT objid, kommunennummer, kommunenavn, bygningsnummer, bygningid, representasjonspunkt, ST_Distance(representasjonspunkt, storm.omrade) AS distance_m
FROM matrikkelenbygning_fe504ac373564e10b85865ef2a507c63.bygning AS b
CROSS JOIN LATERAL (
  SELECT omrade FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna AS s
  WHERE ST_DWithin(b.representasjonspunkt, s.omrade, 5000) -- limit candidate polygons to within 5km for performance
  ORDER BY b.representasjonspunkt <-> s.omrade
  LIMIT 1
) AS storm
WHERE b.kommunenummer = '4204';
